title: Bedrock Edition: Legacy
description: Minecraft Bedrock edition, Except its java...
body:
## A Modpack that Turns Java into Bedrock (Lite)


[Download the Full and New Improved Version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bedrock-edition-modpack)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SkiABXf7lQQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<details>
<summary>Description</summary>

I got the idea to make this in the middle of my sleep on a friday

This is a modpack that was made to turn java into bedrock (just for fun lol), It also includes some performance mods (cuz bedrock is more optimized) and sadly this doesnt include the glitches. Theres the resourcify mod that acts like the marketplace (just imagine that it actually is) to access it go to the resourcepacks menu and click the resourcify button, or on the world menu, datapack menu, shaderpack menu. Cameras are also here and function just like they do in bedrock edition. Cauldrons are dyable and can be used to create potion arrows. UI is *mostly* the same and when i say mostly the same i mean only the hud currently. Fallen trees are also added to the world generation, And the bridging is also the same, Leaves become white when snowing, World hosting and friends list and controller support.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Third Person Animations.
- Bedrock edition chunk loading animation.
- Accarute block placement.
- Bedrock- like loading screens with helpful tips.
- Third person eating animations.
- Sheared Sheep Colors.
- No attack cooldown (Toggleable).
- In game screenshot viewer.
- Position and "paper doll" overlay.
- Dynamic Inactive Hud Opacity.
- Saving status overlay.
- 3D fishing hook.
- Bedrock Cauldrons that hold dyed water and potions.
- Bedrock Sun Glare.
- Reduce the lag from chests and paintings.
- Bedrock Crafting Recipes (Toggleable).
- Bedrock- like chat.
- Bedrock Edition world color noise for grass and water.
- Idle hand animations.
- Held item descriptions (enchantments, books and potions).
- Reach around block placement.
- Quick armor swap.
- Dying and Fallen Trees!
- Bedrock Light block shading.
- Disable flying momentum (Drift) in creative mode.
- Stop elytra flying by pressing space on air.
- Inventory animations.
- Falling snow layers.
- Condensed items in Creative menu.
- Bedrock edition styled wither.
- Bedrock edition styled World creation screen.
- Armor stands with hands.
- Bedrock edition styled Chunk fade.
- Bedrock edition styled "How to play".
- World hosting & Friends list.
- Controller Support.
- ViaFabricPlus (Allows you to join bedrock edition servers, although very wip)
- Bedrock edition "Fast mode" Bubble columns.
- Bedrock edition Impaling enchant.
- Bedrock edition Jump sounds.
- Fabric Skyboxes. (Allows you to use skyboxes in texture packs)
- Bedrock edition air placing.
- More chat history.
- Better menu performance.
- See greater then the server's render distance.
- Marketplace button (Resourcify).

  And **alot of** performance mods!
</details>
